{{Infobox group
| name = Abyssal Palace
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

''See also: [[Abyssal Palace Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Abyssal Palace is a floating fortress that serves as the headquarters for the Abyssal Palace cult, one of the four [[Dreadgod cults]]. The structure is described as a large, floating [[pyramid]] that moves across the landscape, sometimes appearing to roll upon a cloud of hovering boulders. It is capable of utilizing propulsion constructs for movement and possesses specialized [[scripts]] designed to protect the fortress from sudden destruction by powerful entities such as [[Sages]] or [[Heralds]]. The palace has been observed surrounded by hundreds of [[dragons]] and has sustained significant damage in conflicts, including a large hole being torn into its structure. The cult associated with this fortress includes various members such as priests, acolytes, and a [[Herald]], and they utilize specialized equipment like collection towers to harvest power from the destruction caused by [[Dreadgods]].}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The members of [[Abyssal Palace]] conceal their faces with hoods and stony masks.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Represented by [[Brother Aekin]], the Abyssal Palace is a [[Dreadgod cult]] dedicated to the [[Wandering Titan]], with members modeling their [[Path]] after this entity. This flying stone temple resembles a three-pointed [[pyramid]] supported by thousands of boulders and is expected to join the conflict at [[Sky's Edge]]. While the faction lacks a [[Sage]], it possesses a [[Herald]] and several Archlords, alongside members ranging from acolytes to high priests. As the fortress moves over the valley like a plague, it establishes towers in canyon crossroads and places a collection tower near its hovering stronghold. Following the finalization of bounties for its various ranks, the group surrounds the valley and awaits reinforcements. During the unfolding struggle, palms of shadow strike against the side of the floating fortress.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is a faction represented by [[Brother Aekin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Abyssal Palace]] is expected to arrive.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] will join the fight at [[Sky's Edge]] in a few days.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is a stone temple that flies through the air and resembles a three-pointed [[pyramid]] supported by thousands of flying boulders.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is a [[Dreadgod cult]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] does not have a [[Sage]], but it has a [[Herald]] and several Archlords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Bounties have been finalized for [[Abyssal Palace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] bounties include points for acolytes, priests, and high priests.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] moved over Sky’s Edge and the surrounding valley like a plague.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] has towers erected in crossroads of canyons.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] members include acolytes, priestesses, and high priests.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is a fortress that hovers over Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Abyssal Palace]] is a cult of the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is a group whose members model their [[Path]] after the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is expected to receive reinforcements.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Abyssal Palace]] has a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] has a floating fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|There is a priest from [[Abyssal Palace]] in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] has placed a collection tower near the fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] does not want to be camped next to the [[Wandering Titan]] when it wakes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] is one of the groups surrounding the valley.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Palms of shadow strike the side of the [[Abyssal Palace]] fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Abyssal Palace]] has towers designed to collect and store [[Dreadgod power]] in [[scripts]] in their foundations.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Abyssal Palace]] headquarters is a floating [[pyramid]] rolling on a cloud of hovering boulders.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Abyssal Palace]] is a [[pyramid]] that rolls in on flying stones to the west.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Abyssal Palace]] tells legends about the [[Wandering Titan]]'s combat prowess.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
